items.headline: Bipartisan housing bill to become law without Trump's signature
items.summary: Trump said he was withholding his signature "in PROTEST over the fact that the United States Senate is not capable of passing THE SAVE AMERICA ACT."

items.headline: Iowa State's athletic director Jamie Pollard retiring in 2027
items.summary: Pollard has led ISU's athletic department since 2005, making him the country's longest-tenured power four conference athletic director.
